hero.subtitle: After 18 years writing code, I discovered that AI doesn't replace your judgment — it amplifies it. Learn to use Claude as your copilot, recover hours from your week, and write better software without burning out.

built_with.text: This website was entirely built using Claude Code — the same tool you'll master in the book.

features.title: What You'll Learn
features.subtitle: A practical, hands-on guide covering every aspect of AI-assisted development — from your first prompt to building production-ready agents.
features.item1_desc: Learn the difference between weak and strong prompts. Master iteration strategies that get results on the first try instead of the fifth.
features.item2_desc: Diagnose errors faster, understand cryptic stack traces, and fix bugs in half the time with AI-guided debugging sessions.
features.item3_desc: Generate comprehensive test suites, review edge cases you'd miss, and maintain test quality with AI-assisted workflows.
features.item4_desc: Eliminate repetitive tasks by building AI pipelines that handle the boring work so you can focus on what actually matters.
features.item5_desc: A complete chapter dedicated to building a real, production-ready agent from scratch — not a toy, but something you'll actually use.
features.item6_desc: Keep your judgment sharp and use AI as a copilot, not a replacement. Ask well, review well, correct well — the final call is always yours.

about.title: About the Author
about.subtitle: Written by a developer, for developers.
about.bio1: I've spent 18 years writing code, fixing bugs, and designing systems across every stack imaginable. When AI tools started becoming serious, I didn't reach for hype — I reached for my skepticism.
about.bio2: What I found surprised me. Claude doesn't replace judgment — it amplifies it. The developers who thrive with AI are the ones who stay in command: they ask well, review carefully, and correct without hesitation.
about.bio3: The real promise of AI-assisted development isn't writing more code faster. It's recovering time — for your family, your health, your projects that actually matter. That's what this book is about.
about.quote: The final decision is always yours. AI is a copilot — you're the pilot.
